vibe: Expensive, cinematic, moody, authoritative, high-end corporate boardroom

global_rules.spacing_philosophy: Generous spacing for layout, dense 'Control Room' grids for data widgets. High precision.
anti_patterns: No playful, rounded shapes. Stick to sharp corners or max 8px (rounded-lg) for an executive feel.
Do not flip non-directional icons (like cameras, logos).
Do not center-align Arabic data text; default to right-alignment (text-right) naturally.

typography.primary_font_usage: Headings, titles, numbers, key metrics (text-2xl to text-5xl)
typography.secondary_font_usage: Body, table data, UI elements, labels (text-xs to text-lg)

rules.headings: Tight letter spacing (tracking-tight). Use font-light or font-black to break generic bold.
rules.numbers: Use tabular-nums for all KPIs, percentages, and chart axes.
rules.hierarchy: H1 max text-5xl, H2 text-3xl, small labels uppercase with tracking-wide.

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Right-side fixed layout (RTL). Dark surface, elegant 1px border on the left (border-l border-white/10).
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 for macro layout.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Mobile-first, right-to-left optical alignment. Icons on the right, text on the left in list items.

cards.classes: bg-[#111622]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] hover:border-white/10 transition-colors

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#FDE047] transition-all font-bold shadow-lg shadow-yellow-900/20

tables.header: text-right text-slate-400 text-xs font-bold border-b border-white/10 pb-3 uppercase

charts.styling: Dark mode tooltips (bg-[#111622] border-white/10 text-white). Grid lines at strokeOpacity={0.05}. Axis ticks in #94A3B8. Bright glowing stroke lines for Data/RAG.

status_badges.red: bg-red-500/15 text-red-400 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-bold
status_badges.amber: bg-amber-500/15 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-bold
status_badges.green: bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-bold

icons.rules: Must flip directional icons (arrows, chevrons) for RTL using standard logic or 'rtl:rotate-180'.

login_background.description: Elegant abstract dark green/black background for the luxury login portal.

corporate_building.description: Modern corporate building, useful for company overview or headers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure <html dir='rtl' lang='ar'> is set globally in index.html.
Add 'font-family: Tajawal, sans-serif' and 'font-family: Cairo, sans-serif' in your CSS to map to Tailwind classes (e.g., font-sans and font-heading).
Replace left/right logical margins/paddings with start/end classes (e.g. ms-4, pe-6) or rely on RTL setup so the layout naturally aligns.
The Login Portal MUST feel exclusive. Use `login_background` as a full-bleed cover image with a glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl, bg-[#111622]/60) login card overlaid.
In the Executive Dashboard, heavily feature RAG (Red/Amber/Green) statuses on project progress and KPI cards using the defined `rag_status` colors.
For Recharts, ensure you pass custom tooltips and configure strokes/fills to stand out against the `#0A0D14` background.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn', data-testid='sidebar-projects-link').
Customize Shadcn UI to remove default borders and shadows, replacing them with the `cards.classes` styles defined here.
Use Javascript (.js/.jsx) for all implementation, NOT Typescript.
